CustomField.description: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Enter Line 420 from the HUD-1. This is the total of the purchase price and other sums due from the buyer to the seller.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter Line 420 from the HUD-1. This is the total of the purchase price and other sums due from the buyer to the seller.
CustomField.label: Gross Amount Due to Seller
